heading: Required disclosures for promoters
label: 6307e Required disclosures for promoters
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 21 and is classified to .section 13 of Pub. L. 104–272section 6312 of this title

children.heading: Disclosures to the boxing commissions
children.label: a Disclosures to the boxing commissions

children.text: a copy of any agreement in writing to which the promoter is a party with any boxer participating in the match;
a statement made under penalty of perjury that there are no other agreements, written or oral, between the promoter and the boxer with respect to that match; and

children.label: A
children.text: all fees, charges, and expenses that will be assessed by or through the promoter on the boxer pertaining to the event, including any portion of the boxer’s purse that the promoter will receive, and training expenses;

children.label: B
children.text: all payments, gifts, or benefits the promoter is providing to any sanctioning organization affiliated with the event; and

children.label: C
children.text: any reduction in a boxer’s purse contrary to a previous agreement between the promoter and the boxer or a purse bid held for the event.
the amounts of any compensation or consideration that a promoter has contracted to receive from such match;

all fees, charges, and expenses that will be assessed by or through the promoter on the boxer pertaining to the event, including any portion of the boxer’s purse that the promoter will receive, and training expenses; and
any reduction in a boxer’s purse contrary to a previous agreement between the promoter and the boxer or a purse bid held for the event.

children.heading: Information to be available to State Attorney General
children.label: c Information to be available to State Attorney General
children.text: A promoter shall make information required to be disclosed under this section available to the chief law enforcement officer of the State in which the match is to be held upon request of such officer.
